class Solution:
    def canBeTypedWords(self, text: str, brokenLetters: str) -> int:
test:
def check(candidate):
    assert candidate(text = "jumped over the lazy dog",brokenLetters = "zg") == 3
    assert candidate(text = "nopqrstuvwxyz",brokenLetters = "xyz") == 0
